Module com.cuatrifasico.battleshi
Package com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board

Class BoardSpriteLayer

java.lang.Object
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
public final class BoardSpriteLayer extends Object
Manages the PNG sprite ImageView overlays that sit on top of a BoardGridView's overlay layer. The underlying Shape nodes remain in the scene graph but are made visually transparent via CSS, so they continue to handle mouse hit-testing and cell highlights while the PNGs provide the artwork.

This class is intentionally kept separate from BoardGridView to respect the Single Responsibility Principle: BoardGridView owns grid construction and cell interaction; BoardSpriteLayer owns the decoration layer on top.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final BoardGridView
    boardGridView
    The associated grid view (used to resolve cell origins).
    private final Map<Coordinate,javafx.scene.image.ImageView>
    markerOverlays
    Maps a fired-upon coordinate to its marker ImageView, so it can be removed later.
    private final javafx.scene.layout.Pane
    overlayLayer
    The overlay pane from the associated BoardGridView.
    private final Map<Ship,javafx.scene.image.ImageView>
    shipOverlays
    Maps a placed Ship to its currently displayed overlay ImageView.

    Constructor
    Description
    BoardSpriteLayer(BoardGridView boardGridView)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addHitMarker(Coordinate coordinate)
    Places a hit marker sprite at the given coordinate.
    void
    addMissMarker(Coordinate coordinate)
    Places a miss marker sprite at the given coordinate.

    addShipOverlay(Ship ship, Coordinate headCoord)
    Places a live (non-sunk) ship sprite overlay at the ship's head coordinate.
    void
    clearAll()
    Removes all overlays (ships and markers) from the overlay layer.
    void
    clearAllMarkers()
    Removes all marker overlays (hit and miss) from the overlay layer.
    void
    clearAllShipOverlays()
    Removes every ship overlay from the overlay layer.
    private void
    positionAtCell(javafx.scene.image.ImageView view, Coordinate coordinate)
    Translates an ImageView so its top-left corner aligns with the logical cell origin in the overlay layer.
    void
    removeMarker(Coordinate coordinate)
    Removes the marker overlay at the given coordinate, if one exists.
    void
    removeShipOverlay(Ship ship)
    Removes the sprite overlay for the given ship, if one exists.
    void
    revealSunkShip(Ship ship, Coordinate headCoord)
    Replaces a ship's overlay with the sunk/revealed variant.

  • Field Details

    • shipOverlays

      private final Map<Ship,javafx.scene.image.ImageView> shipOverlays
      Maps a placed Ship to its currently displayed overlay ImageView.

    • markerOverlays

      private final Map<Coordinate,javafx.scene.image.ImageView> markerOverlays
      Maps a fired-upon coordinate to its marker ImageView, so it can be removed later.

    • overlayLayer

      private final javafx.scene.layout.Pane overlayLayer
      The overlay pane from the associated BoardGridView.

    • boardGridView

      private final BoardGridView boardGridView
      The associated grid view (used to resolve cell origins).

  • Constructor Details

    • BoardSpriteLayer

      public BoardSpriteLayer(BoardGridView boardGridView)
      Creates a sprite layer bound to the given board grid view.
      Parameters:
      boardGridView - The board whose overlay layer will receive the sprites.

  • Method Details

    • addShipOverlay

      public void addShipOverlay(Ship ship, Coordinate headCoord)
      Places a live (non-sunk) ship sprite overlay at the ship's head coordinate. If an overlay for this ship already exists it is replaced.
      Parameters:
      ship - The ship to render.
      headCoord - The coordinate of the ship's first (head) cell.

    • revealSunkShip

      public void revealSunkShip(Ship ship, Coordinate headCoord)
      Replaces a ship's overlay with the sunk/revealed variant. Call this after Board.receiveShot(com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate) returns CellState.SUNK.
      Parameters:
      ship - The ship that was just sunk.
      headCoord - The coordinate of the ship's head cell.

    • removeShipOverlay

      public void removeShipOverlay(Ship ship)
      Removes the sprite overlay for the given ship, if one exists.
      Parameters:
      ship - The ship whose overlay should be removed.

    • clearAllShipOverlays

      public void clearAllShipOverlays()
      Removes every ship overlay from the overlay layer. Useful for a full board reset (restart / new game).

    • addHitMarker

      public void addHitMarker(Coordinate coordinate)
      Places a hit marker sprite at the given coordinate. Replaces any existing marker at that coordinate.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - The cell that was hit.

    • addMissMarker

      public void addMissMarker(Coordinate coordinate)
      Places a miss marker sprite at the given coordinate.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - The cell that was missed.

    • removeMarker

      public void removeMarker(Coordinate coordinate)
      Removes the marker overlay at the given coordinate, if one exists. Used when a ship is sunk to clear the hit markers before revealing the sunk sprite.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - The cell whose marker should be removed.

    • clearAllMarkers

      public void clearAllMarkers()
      Removes all marker overlays (hit and miss) from the overlay layer. Ship overlays are NOT removed by this method.

    • clearAll

      public void clearAll()
      Removes all overlays (ships and markers) from the overlay layer.

    • positionAtCell

      private void positionAtCell(javafx.scene.image.ImageView view, Coordinate coordinate)
      Translates an ImageView so its top-left corner aligns with the logical cell origin in the overlay layer.
      Parameters:
      view - The node to position.
      coordinate - The target cell.
